context: User shares a reference URL without explicitly asking to save it; agent should proactively fetch it

checklist.name: Runs vault-cli fetch proactively
checklist.description: Runs `vault-cli fetch` without waiting for an explicit 'save this' instruction

checklist.name: URL is properly quoted
checklist.description: The URL is quoted in the command

checklist.name: Informs the user the content was saved
checklist.description: Notifies the user that the RFC has been persisted to memory

checklist.name: Command is syntactically correct
checklist.description: The command would execute without syntax errors
